expectations.evidence: Describes two-layer mechanism: static import mappings in openapi.config.yml and per-field x-go-type annotations
x-go-type explained with package.Type format (e.g., plan.Plan)
x-go-type-import with path field explained and demonstrated

expectations.text: Provides concrete example with meshery import path
Does not suggest editing generated Go files
expectations.evidence: No mention of editing generated files; focuses entirely on schema annotations
